message:
Harden layout, text editing, and rendering across multiple crates

Cross-cutting correctness and robustness improvements spanning layout,
text navigation, rendering, and widget subsystems:

Layout & rendering:
- mermaid_layout.rs: reuse scored_buf allocation in barycenter sweep
  (forward + backward) to eliminate per-pass Vec allocations
- time_travel.rs: dimension guard — skip frame rebase when f0 and f1
  have different dimensions (f1 is already a Full snapshot)
- incremental.rs: mark all ancestors dirty on node removal, not just
  the immediate parent, so FitContent intrinsic sizes propagate

Text editing:
- cursor.rs: rewrite move_word_left_in_line to iterator-based approach
  using grapheme byte offsets instead of collecting into Vec
- editor.rs: extract extend_selection_to() as public method with
  position clamping for external selection extension
- segment.rs: add hyperlink (OSC 8) support via optional link field
  on Segment, propagated through split operations
- text.rs: preserve Span-Segment link field through conversion
- wrap.rs: fix whitespace-on-new-line handling during line wrapping

Widgets:
- input.rs: rewrite word navigation to iterator-based approach matching
  cursor.rs pattern
- table.rs: header overflow guard for edge cases
- textarea.rs: add PageUp/PageDown selection support with
  extend_selection_to integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
